TableManager.Title: Loot Table Manager
TableManager.MenuHint: Browse and edit loot tables, boss overrides, and keyword rules.
TableManager.RevertConfirmBody: Discard your changes to "{name}" and restore the pack default?
TableManager.NoTableSelected: Select a table on the left, or create a new one.
TableManager.RollsHint: Dice formula for number of draws, e.g. 1d2. May use @cr.
TableManager.DropHint: Drag items or roll tables here to add entries
TableManager.UnsavedChangesBody: You have unsaved changes to "{name}". Discard them and switch tables?
TableManager.ValidationFailed: Table has problems and was not saved. See highlighted entries.
TableManager.ImportFileLabel: Choose a JSON file exported from this module.
TableManager.RulesEditorHint: Rules are checked in order, top to bottom. First enabled match wins.

LootReview.Title: Loot Review
LootReview.SessionMissing: This loot session no longer exists.
LootReview.RerollAllConfirmBody: Reroll generated loot for every included NPC? Carried gear is unaffected.
LootReview.DiscardConfirmBody: Discard this loot session? This cannot be undone.

Distribution.Title: Loot Distribution
Distribution.SessionMissing: This loot session no longer exists.
Distribution.NoGMBanner: No GM is connected. Claims and allocations are disabled until a GM is online.
Distribution.SplitRemainderChat: {name} received the odd {denom} from the even split.
Distribution.AbandonRemainingConfirmBody: Abandon every unclaimed item in this session? Players can no longer claim them.
Distribution.FinalizeNotResolved: Not everything is resolved yet ({resolved}/{total}). Claim, give, or abandon the rest before finalizing.
Distribution.ManualAllocationMismatch: {denom} does not sum to the pot amount.

AssignTable.Title: Assign loot table: {name}
AssignTable.Body: Pick an existing loot table for this NPC, create a new one, or clear the current assignment.

History.Title: Loot History
History.MenuHint: View finalized and discarded loot sessions, and revert the most recent finalize.
History.Empty: No finalized or discarded loot sessions yet.
History.NothingGranted: Nothing was granted in this session.
History.RevertConfirmBody: Revert this finalized session? Created items will be deleted, granted currency subtracted, and carried gear restored where possible.

TableStore.InvalidJson: The file is not valid JSON.
TableStore.SchemaMismatch: The file does not match the expected export format.
TableStore.InvalidTable: A table in the file failed validation.
TableStore.PackMismatch: This file was exported from a different content pack and cannot be imported here.

Validate.NotAnObject: Table is not a valid object.
Validate.BadCurrencyFormula: Entry has an invalid currency formula.
Validate.BadQtyFormula: Entry has an invalid quantity formula.
Validate.UnresolvedNestedTable: Entry references a table that does not exist.

Intent.SessionNotReleased: This loot session is not open for claims right now.
Intent.ItemNotFound: That item is no longer part of this session.
Intent.ActorNotInParty: That character is not part of the party.
Intent.ItemNotClaimable: That item can't be claimed right now.
Intent.ItemNotUnclaimable: That item can't be unclaimed right now.
Intent.ItemNotAbandonable: That item can't be abandoned right now.
Intent.ItemNotRestorable: That item can't be restored right now.
Intent.AllocationActorNotInParty: One or more recipients in that allocation are not part of the party.
Intent.BadAllocation: Allocation amounts must be whole, non-negative numbers.
Intent.AllocationMismatch: The allocation does not sum to the pot amount.
Intent.UnexpectedError: Something went wrong processing that action. Please try again.

Finalize.NotResolved: Not everything is resolved yet. Claim, give, or abandon the rest before finalizing.
Finalize.PartialFailure: Some grants could not be applied for: {actors}. Check the log for details.

Revert.NotFinalized: This session has not been finalized and cannot be reverted.
Revert.NotMostRecent: Only the most recently finalized session can be reverted.
Revert.MissingItems: Some granted items could not be removed (already deleted or moved): {items}.

SessionStore.UnknownSession: That loot session no longer exists ({id}).
SessionStore.IllegalTransition: That loot session cannot move from "{from}" to "{to}".
